name: Xiaohongshu Importer Plus

releases.author: lxl448080113
releases.description:
This patch restores imports from Xiaohongshu mobile share links generated with `xhslink.cn`.

### Fixed

- Added support for current `xhslink.cn` and historical `xhslink.com` short links.
- Normalized mobile links to HTTPS while preserving note security parameters.
- Improved handling of punctuation and invisible characters in copied share text.
- Requested the desktop page representation so structured note data remains available on mobile.
- Improved title, content, image, and video parsing from structured note data.
- Added regression tests for desktop URLs, mobile share text, short-link variants, and unsafe lookalike hosts.

The reported desktop URL and mobile short link were verified against the same note, and the updated plugin was tested successfully in Obsidian before release.
releases.name: Xiaohongshu Importer Plus 1.0.3

releases.author: lxl448080113
releases.description: Fix image links to use vault-absolute paths so moving notes no longer breaks imported image references.
